name: An Ultimate End of the Year Celebration
description:
The Ultimate Academy is having an end of the year holiday celebration. In the spirit of things, it's time to unwind and forget the world for a minute.

This is a non despair au featuring the v3 class. They're all 18+ in their final year at the Ultimate Academy.

Tags: Kaede Akamatsu, Shuichi Saihara, Himiko Yumeno, Maki Harukana, Rantaro Amami, Kirumi Tojo, Ryoma Hoshi, Korekiyo Shinguji, Kiyo, Angie Yonaga, Miu Iruma, Kokichi Oma, Ooma, Tenko Chabashira, Gonta Gokuhara, Kaito Momota. Danganronpa v3
creator: Sugarcubed
